headline.frontierHorizonLabel: Claude Mythos Preview — above METR's reliable measurement ceiling
headline.computeGrowthLabel: Training compute growth since 2020 (Epoch AI trends, updated Feb 2026)
headline.costHalvingLabel: Inference cost at fixed capability (Epoch AI)

sources: METR — Measuring AI Ability to Complete Long Tasks + Time Horizon 1.1 (metr.org/time-horizons, changelog through May 8 2026)
Epoch AI — Trends dashboard (updated Feb 5 2026), notable-models DB (updated Jul 14 2026), Grok 4 training resource footprint (Sep 2025)
notes: METR TH1.1 (Jan 2026) revised post-2023 doubling time to 130.8 days (~4.3 months), slightly slower than the prior ~105-day estimate but still faster than the pre-2024 7-month baseline.
METR corrected a regularization error on Mar 3 2026; late-2025/early-2026 horizons were revised. Claude Opus 4.6 settled at ~6 h post-correction; GPT-5.2 cluster remains ~5–6 h.
Claude Mythos Preview (added May 8 2026) measured at ≥16 h on 50% horizon, 3 h 6 min on 80% horizon. METR explicitly flags measurements above 16 h as unreliable with the current TH1.1 suite.
Epoch AI confirms Grok 4 (~5e26 FLOP, Jul 2025) as the largest known training run to date, superseding Grok 3 (~4e26 FLOP) which was the first model to cross the 1e26 FLOP threshold.
GPT-5 Epoch estimate: ~3e25 FLOP pretrain (median); exact compute unconfirmed by OpenAI.
Compute growth headline updated to 5×/yr per Epoch AI trends dashboard (frontier LLMs since 2020).

Stanford HAI AI Index 2026 (Apr 13 2026): GPQA frontier reached 93% vs 81.2% expert baseline; SWE-bench Verified climbed from 60% to near 100% of human baseline in a single year; ClockBench 50.1% vs 90.1% confirmed.

horizon.note: Added to METR Apr 4 2025; ~59 min per METR TH1.1
Added to METR Jul 20 2025; exact published horizon not yet confirmed in public data; ~3 h interpolated from trend
Added to METR Feb 4 2026; post-correction cluster ~5–6 h
Added to METR Feb 20 2026; METR published 6.5 h on 'high' scaffold
Added to METR Feb 20 2026; revised ~6 h after METR Mar 3 2026 regularization correction
Added to METR Apr 10 2026; exact horizon not yet confirmed in public reporting
Added to METR Apr 15 2026; community pre-METR estimates ~11 h; exact official figure pending public release
Added to METR May 8 2026; ≥16 h on 50% horizon, 3 h 6 min on 80% horizon — above METR's reliable measurement ceiling

compute.note: First model confirmed above 1e26 FLOP threshold (Epoch AI)
Epoch AI median pretrain estimate ~3e25 FLOP; exact figure not disclosed by OpenAI
Largest known training run to date per Epoch AI trends dashboard (Jul 2026)

priceLabel: GPT-3-class capability (MMLU ≈ 42), $ per 1M tokens — ~1,000× drop in 3 yrs; Epoch AI confirms halving every 2 months
